title: Add N/A option to Date field
excerpt: I’d like to be able to fill in a date field with “N/A”, so that I’m not second-guessing whether the date is not set yet (empty) or if I have already determined it’s not needed.

posts.author: AnyaP (Anya P)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to be able to fill in a date field with “N/A”, so that I’m not second-guessing whether the date is not set yet (empty) or if I have already determined it’s not needed.

posts.author: fdubru (Dubru)
posts.cookedHtml: I support this. This is a vary basic requirement.
